name: infer_value_proposition
description: Compose a value proposition connecting founder skills to a specific problem for a target segment. Call after inferring problems. Requires skills, problems, and segments from prior steps.

problems.description: Inferred problem statements from prior step.

segments.description: Inferred customer segments from prior step.

for_segment.description: The target customer segment this proposition addresses.

solves_problem.description: The specific problem this proposition solves.

unique_advantage.description: What makes the founder uniquely positioned to deliver this.
